title: Sora app 这是要下线了嘛！

content.summary: Sora app 这是要下线了嘛！ Sora (@soraofficialapp) We’re saying goodbye to the Sora app. To everyone who created with Sora, shared it, and built community around it: thank you. What you made with Sora mattered, and we know this news is disappointing. We’ll share more soon, including timelines for the app and API and details on preserving your work. – The Sora Team — https://nitter.net/soraofficialapp/status/2036546752535470382#m

Post title: Sora app 这是要下线了嘛！

Post summary: Sora app 这是要下线了嘛！ Sora (@soraofficialapp) We’re saying goodbye to the Sora app. To everyone who created with Sora, shared it, and built community around it: thank you. What you made with Sora mattered, and we know this news is disappointing. We’ll share more soon, including timelines for the app and API and details on preserving your work. – The Sora Team — https://nitter.net/soraofficialapp/status/2036546752535470382#m

Sora app 这是要下线了嘛！ Sora (@soraofficialapp) We’re saying goodbye to the Sora app. To everyone who created with Sora, shared it, and built community around it: thank you. What you made with Sora mattered, and we know this news is disappointing. We’ll share more soon, including timelines for the app and API and details on preserving your work. – The Sora Team — https://nitter.net/soraofficialapp/status/2036546752535470382#m
